raw.experienceSectionText: Experience Founder and Principal Strategist Destination Global LLC · Self-employed Jul 2023 - Present · 2 yrs 11 mos Greater Boston · Hybrid Destination Global is a boutique advisory and strategy practice that supports high-achieving senior leaders in designing their next chapter with clarity, structure and sustainable energy. Strategic Advisory and Product Architecture • Design and deliver high-end strategic transformation programs for senior leaders, including annual mastermind groups, multi-week master groups and premium 1 to 1 advisory containers. • Architect the Strategy and Energy of Scale methodology used across all programs and retreats. • Provide strategic guidance to clients on business focus, premium offer design, portfolio career development and sustainable execution systems. Program Development and Delivery • Built and led multiple cohorts of Russian and English language master groups supporting women in strategic clarity, identity evolution and energy aligned growth. • Designed and facilitated an eight person immersive retreat in Dubai focused on annual planning, vision architecture and energy work. • Delivered immersive VIP strategy days and executive offsites in California and New York for business leaders seeking clarity, alignment and expansion. Global Client Engagement • Advised corporate professionals, founders and senior leaders across North America, Europe and the Middle East. • Supported strategic roadmapping for marketing, sales and customer success teams at Fullscript, reporting to the Vice President of Marketing and Sales. • Led go to market planning for an SMB Ambassadors Program in EMEA. • Managed and developed a distributed team of seven direct contributors.
